column4: Standard architectural dimensions: toilet 21x28in, tub 30x60in, vanity 24x21in, queen bed 60x80in, sofa 84x36in, counter 24in deep. Nightstands added. Stove + sink on counter. Kitchen island. All from NKBA/IRC standards.

Vision score 0.90 is still lying. A-Frame House Plus has 7 storage rooms, loft at bottom, deck in middle. Score checks room PRESENCE but not QUALITY. Need: visual side-by-side comparison as the ACTUAL scoring function. 'Which would you rather stay in?' = the only metric that matters.
